function initFreshChat() {  

    
    window.fcWidget.init({
      token: "790fb920-8328-450a-87ed-51a6737ab05f",

      siteId: "OzoneRO",

      disableEvents: true,
      cssNames: {
        widget: 'fc_frame',

        expanded: 'fc_expanded'
      },
        
      showFAQOnOpen: false,
      hideFAQ: false,
      agent: {
        hideName: false,
        hidePic: false,
        hideBio: false,
      },
       headerProperty: {
	      //If you have multiple sites you can use the appName and appLogo to overwrite the values.

      },

    <script>
        jQuery(function(){
            jQuery('.shopping-cart .cart-row .item-remove').click(function (e) {
                jQuery('.main-content').css({position:'relative'});
                jQuery('.main-content').append('<div id="overlay-checkout-cart" style=" position:absolute; top:0; left:0; width:100%; height:100%; opacity:0.5; background:white; z-index:101;"></div>');
            });

            let spinner = jQuery('.mini-cart .mini-cart-sub .spinner');
            jQuery('.mini-cart .mini-cart-item .item-remove').click(function (e) {
                e.preventDefault();

                spinner.css('display', 'block').fadeTo(200, 1);

                jQuery.ajax({
                    type: 'post',
                    data: {
                        id: jQuery(this).data('id'),
                        form_key: jQuery('#mini-cart-formkey').val()
                    },
                    url: jQuery(this).attr('href'),
                    dataType: 'json',
                    success: function(json) {
                        if (json['minicart']) {
                            let miniCart = json['minicart'];
                            miniCart = miniCart.replace('mini-cart has-item', 'mini-cart has-item open-mini-cart');

                            jQuery('.mini-cart-wrapper').html(miniCart);
                            jQuery('.mini-cart-sub').show();
                        }
                    }
                });
            });

            // Clever Hide for SEO
            jQuery('.clever-link-cart').click(function(){
                window.open(jQuery(this).data('link'), "_self");
                return false;
            });



            let type = 'Content';

            if (jQuery("body").hasClass("catalog-category-view")) {
                type = 'Category'
            }
            if (jQuery("body").hasClass("splash-page-oz-common-brand") ||
                jQuery("body").hasClass("has-branding") ||
                jQuery("body").hasClass("splash-page-thirth-type") ||
                jQuery("body").hasClass("attributesplash-page-view")
            ) {
                type = 'Category'
            }
            if (jQuery("body").hasClass("splash-page-oz-books-author")) {
                type = 'Category'
            }
            if (jQuery("body").hasClass("splash-page-oz-books-publisher")) {
                type = 'Category'
            }
            if (jQuery("body").hasClass("cms-our-shops")) {
                type = 'Category'
            }

            if (jQuery("body").hasClass("splash-page-oz-common-shop") || jQuery("body").hasClass("splash-page-oz-common-shops")) {
                type = 'Category'
            }
            if (jQuery("body").hasClass("catalog-product-view")) {
                type = 'Product'
            }
            if (jQuery("body").hasClass("instantsearchplus-result-index")) {
                type = 'Search'
            }
            if (jQuery("body").hasClass("checkout-cart-index")) {
                type = "Basket"
            }
            if (jQuery("body").hasClass("lotusbreath-onestepcheckout-index-index")) {
                type = "Checkout"
            }
            if (jQuery("body").hasClass("checkout-onepage-success")) {
                type = "Confirmation"
            }

            if (jQuery("body").hasClass("cms-home")) {
                type = 'Home'
            }

            if (type) {
                window.insider_object = window.insider_object || {};
                window.insider_object.page = {
                    "type": type
                }
            }

            window.insider_object.calculator = 'no'

            if(!jQuery("body").hasClass("checkout-onepage-success")) {
                try {
                    let basketObject = JSON.parse('{"currency":"Lei","total":0,"shipping_cost":0,"line_items":{},"discount":0}');

                    for (const key in basketObject.line_items) {
                        const taxonomy = basketObject.line_items[key].product.taxonomy;
                        const array = Object.keys(taxonomy).map(function (key) {
                            return taxonomy[key];
                        });
                        basketObject.line_items[key].product.taxonomy = array
                    }

                    if(Object.keys(basketObject.line_items).length>0){
                        for (const elem in basketObject.line_items) {
                            const line_items = Object.keys(basketObject.line_items).map(function (elem) {
                                return basketObject.line_items[elem];
                            });
                            basketObject.line_items = line_items
                        }
                    }else{
                        basketObject.line_items = []
                    }


                    window.insider_object.basket = basketObject
                } catch (error) {
                    console.error(error);
                }
            }


        });
    </script></div>

    @media only screen and (max-width: 479px) {
        .show-by-mobile-version {
            display: block;
        }
        .category-products .toolbar .drop-down {
            display: none;
        }

        .sorting-arrow-desktop {
            display: none;
        }

        .bottom-toolbar .open-responsive-sidebar, .bottom-toolbar .sorting-wrapper, .bottom-toolbar .toolbar-label, .bottom-toolbar .drop-down, .bottom-toolbar .view-mode, .bottom-toolbar #splash_filters {
            display: none !important;
        }

        .top-toolbar .toolbar {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: space-between;
        }

        .top-toolbar #splash_filters {
            display: none;
        }

        .top-toolbar .toolbar .view-mode {
           margin: 0;
        }
    }

.product-box{
  height: 402px;
}

  position: absolute;
  bottom:0;
}
/* Checkbox */

.products-list input[type="checkbox"] {
  position: absolute;
  opacity: 0;
}

.products-list input[type="checkbox"] + label {
  position: relative;
  cursor: pointer;
  padding: 0;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  color: #0b7eb6;
}
.products-list input[type="checkbox"] + label:before {
  content: '';
  margin-right: 10px;
  display: inline-block;
  vertical-align: text-top;
  width: 16px;
  height: 16px;
  background: white;
  border-radius: 2px;
  border: 1px solid #e7e7e7;
}
.products-list input[type="checkbox"]:hover + label:before {
  background: #0b7eb6;
}
.products-list input[type="checkbox"]:focus + label:before {
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12);
}
.products-list input[type="checkbox"]:checked + label:before {
  background: #0b7eb6;
  border:0;
}
.products-list input[type="checkbox"]:disabled + label {
  color: #b8b8b8;
  cursor: auto;
}

<script type="text/javascript">

    function toCompare(id,action){
		jQuery.ajax({
			type: "POST",
			url: '/innologica-utils/?action=toCompare',
			data: {'id':id,'act':action},
			async: true,
			success : function(data) {
				data = jQuery.parseJSON(data);

				if(data['err'] && data['err'] == 3){
					window.location.replace("/customer/account/login/");
				} else if(data['err'] && data['err'] == 2){
					jQuery('.compare-list-error').html(data['err_msg']);
					jQuery("#compare-product-"+id).prop( "checked",false);
				}else{
					if(!action){
						jQuery("#compare-product-"+id).prop( "checked",false);
					}
					getCompareItems();

				}
			}
		});
	}

	function getCompareItems(){

		if(gReadCookie('noCompareItems') == 1){
			return true;
		}

		jQuery.ajax({
			type: "POST",
			url: '/innologica-utils/?action=getCompareItems',
			data: {},
			async: true,
			success : function(data) {
				data = jQuery.parseJSON(data);
				if(data['status'] == 'OK'){
					compareHtmlBox = data['html'];
					compareProductIds = data['ids'];
				}else{
					compareHtmlBox = '';
					compareProductIds = new Array();
				}
				jQuery('.compare-list-popup').html('<div class="popup-container">' + compareHtmlBox + '</div>');

		  if (!/Mobi|Android/i.test(navigator.userAgent) && typeof id != 'undefined') {
			movePopup(jQuery("#compare-product-"+id).parent('.compare-box'));
		  }

		  if (/Mobi|Android/i.test(navigator.userAgent)) {
			if(jQuery('.compare-list-inner').css('display') == 'none'){
			  //jQuery('.compare-list-inner').attr('style', 'display: none;');
			  jQuery('.compare-list-popup').addClass( "collapsed" );
			  jQuery('.compare-list-popup').toggleClass( "blink" );
			  setTimeout(function(){
			   // toggle back after 1 second
			   jQuery('.compare-list-popup').toggleClass( "blink" );
			 },600);
			}
			if(jQuery('.compare-list-inner').children('.compare-list-product').length > 0 ) {
			  jQuery('.compare-list-popup').attr('style','display: block !important');
			}
		  }
			}
		});
	}

	function removeCompareItems(){
		jQuery.ajax({
			type: "POST",
			url: '/innologica-utils/?action=removeCompareItems',
			data: {},
			async: true,
			success : function(data) {
				data = jQuery.parseJSON(data);
				if(data['status'] == 'OK'){
					getCompareItems();
					jQuery(".compare-box-input").prop( "checked",false);
				}else{
					compareHtmlBox = '';
				}
				closeComparePopup();
			}
		});
	}

	function movePopup (product) {
		jQuery('.compare-list-popup').detach().appendTo(product);
	}

	function closeComparePopup() {
		jQuery(".compare-list-popup").hide();
	}

	function collapseCompare(){
	  if(jQuery('.compare-list-inner').css('display') == 'none'){
		jQuery('.compare-list-popup').removeClass('collapsed');
	  //  jQuery('.compare-list-popup').height(200);
	  }
	  else{
		jQuery('.compare-list-popup').addClass('collapsed');
	  //  jQuery('.compare-list-popup').height(24);
	  }
	}

	var compareHtmlBox = '';
	var compareProductIds = new Array();
	//getCompareItems();


	jQuery(document).ready(function(){

		jQuery('.category-products').append('<div class="compare-list-popup" style="display: none;"><div class="popup-container">' + compareHtmlBox + '</div></div>');

		jQuery('.compare-box').each(function(){
			if (typeof compareProductIds[jQuery(this).attr('data')] !== 'undefined') {
			  jQuery("#compare-product-"+jQuery(this).attr('data')+"").prop( "checked", true );
			}
		});

		if (!/Mobi|Android/i.test(navigator.userAgent)) {
			jQuery('.compare-box').on('mouseover', function(){
			movePopup(jQuery(this));
                if(jQuery('.compare-list-inner').children('.compare-list-product').length > 0 ) {
                    jQuery('.compare-list-popup').show();
                }
			});
			jQuery('.compare-box').on('mouseleave', function(){
				jQuery('.compare-list-popup').hide();
			});

			jQuery('.compare-list-popup').on('mouseenter', function(){
				jQuery(this).show();
			});

			jQuery('.compare-list-popup').on('mouseleave', function(){
				jQuery(this).hide();
			});
		}

		if (/Mobi|Android/i.test(navigator.userAgent)) {
		  if(jQuery('.compare-list-inner').children('.compare-list-product').length > 0 ) {
			jQuery('.compare-list-popup').attr('style','display: block !important');
		  }
		}

            const crumbs = JSON.parse('{"0":"Tema","1":"Pok\\u00e9mon"}');

            window.insider_object = window.insider_object || {};

            for (const key in products) {
                const taxonomy = products[key].taxonomy;

                const array = Object.keys(taxonomy) .map(function(key) {
                    return taxonomy[key];
                });
                products[key].taxonomy = array;
                products[key].custom["is_webview"] = document.is_webview;
            }


            window.insider_object.listing = {
                "is_webview": document.is_webview,
                "items": Object.keys(products).map(function(key) {
                    return products[key];
                })
            }

            const crumbArr = Object.keys(crumbs).map(function(key) {
                return crumbs[key];
            });

            window.insider_object.crumbs = crumbArr


        } catch (error) {
            console.error(error);
        }

	})
</script>

<script>
    jQuery(document).ready(function($) {
        var filteredURL = ''
        var priceValue = ''
        var selectedInterests = []

        $('.age-group img').on('click', function() {
            $('.age-group img').removeClass('selected');
            $(this).addClass('selected');
            $(this).parent('.option-wrapper').addClass('selected');
            $(this).siblings('input[type="checkbox"]').prop('checked', true);
            filteredURL = `?${$(this).siblings('input[type="checkbox"]').val()}`
            goToStep(2);
        });

        $('.interests img').on('click', function() {
            $(this).toggleClass('selected');
            $(this).parent('.option-wrapper').toggleClass('selected');
            $(this).siblings('input[type="checkbox"]').prop('checked', $(this).hasClass('selected'));

            if ($(this).hasClass('selected')) {
                if (!selectedInterests.includes($(this).siblings('input[type="checkbox"]').val())) {
                    selectedInterests.push($(this).siblings('input[type="checkbox"]').val());
                }
            } else {
                selectedInterests = selectedInterests.filter(v => v !== $(this).siblings('input[type="checkbox"]').val());
            }

            const interestsParam = selectedInterests.length > 0 ? `interes=${selectedInterests.join(',')}` : '';
            filteredURL = `${filteredURL.split('&interes=')[0]}${interestsParam ? `&${interestsParam}` : ''}`;

            validateStep2();
        });

        $('.price img').on('click', function() {
            $('.price img').removeClass('selected');
            $(this).addClass('selected');
            $(this).parent('.option-wrapper').addClass('selected');
            $(this).siblings('input[type="checkbox"]').prop('checked', true);
            if ($(this).siblings('input[type="checkbox"]').val() === '200+') {
                priceValue = `tsena=200-${$('input.price-max').val()}`
            } else if ($(this).siblings('input[type="checkbox"]').val() === '-50') {
                priceValue = `tsena=${$('input.price-min').val()}-50`
            } else {
                priceValue = $(this).siblings('input[type="checkbox"]').val()
            }
            filteredURL = `${filteredURL}&${priceValue}`
            completeSteps();
        });

        function validateStep2() {
            const selectedCount = $('.interests img.selected').length;
            if (selectedCount >= 2) {
                $('#continue-button').show();
            } else {
                $('#continue-button').hide();
            }
        }

        window.goToStep = function(step) {
            $('.step-content').removeClass('active');
            $('#step-' + step).addClass('active');

            $('.step-indicator').removeClass('active');
            $(`#step-${step}-indicator`).addClass('active');
            $(`#step-${step-1}-indicator`).removeClass('active').addClass('complete').empty().append(`<i class="fa-solid fa-check" style="font-size: 13px;"></i>`);

            $('html, body').animate({
                scrollTop: $('.question-panel').offset().top
            }, 800);

        }

        function completeSteps() {
            $('.price img').css('pointer-events', 'none')
            $('#lego-loading-overlay').show()
            window.location.href = filteredURL
        }
    });
</script>                            </div>

            <div class="bg"></div>
            <div class="handle min selected" style="left: 0px;"></div>
            <div class="span" style="left: 0px; width: 162px;"></div>
            <div class="handle max" style="left: 162px;"></div>

        <div class="price-limit">
            <input class="is_initialized" type="hidden" value="0" autocomplete="off">
            <input class="is_slider" type="hidden" value="0">
            <input class="slider_items" type="hidden" value="">
            <input class="is_static" type="hidden" value="0">

            <input class="price-value-max" type="hidden" value="465">
            <div class="max"><span class="price">465&nbsp;<span class="currency notranslate">Lei</span></span></div>

    <script>
        jQuery(function() {
            jQuery('.layer-slider.price_slider').each(function() {
                var $layerSlider = jQuery(this);
                var onFilter = function() {
                    if (typeof BubbleLayer !== 'undefined') {

                        var valFrom = parseFloat($layerSlider.find('.price-slider-inputs input.left').val());
                        var valTo = parseFloat($layerSlider.find('.price-slider-inputs input.right').val());

                        var valMin = parseFloat($layerSlider.find('.price-min').val());
                        var valMax = parseFloat($layerSlider.find('.price-max').val());

						var isSlider = parseInt($layerSlider.find('.is_slider').val());
						var sliderItems = $layerSlider.find('.slider_items').val();
						sliderItems = sliderItems.split(',');
						var sliderSelectedItems = $layerSlider.find('.slider_selected_items').val();
						sliderSelectedItems = sliderSelectedItems.split(',');


                        if (valFrom == 0 || isNaN(valFrom)) {
                            // valFrom = '';
                            valFrom = parseFloat($layerSlider.find('.price-value-min').val());
                        }

                        if (valTo == 0 || isNaN(valTo)) {
                            // valTo = '';
                            valTo = parseFloat($layerSlider.find('.price-value-max').val());
                        }

                        if (valTo && valFrom && valTo < valFrom) {
                            var tmp = valTo;
                            valTo = valFrom;
                            valFrom = tmp;
                        }

                        if (valFrom && valFrom < valMin) {
                            valFrom = valMin;
                        }

                        if (valFrom && valFrom > valMax) {
                            valFrom = valMax - 1;
                        }

                        if (valTo && valTo > valMax) {
                            valTo = valMax;
                        }

                        if (valTo && valTo < valMin) {
                            valTo = valMin + 1;
                        }

                        var url = BubbleLayer.buildPriceUrl($layerSlider.find('.request-var').val(), valFrom, valTo,isSlider,sliderItems,sliderSelectedItems);


                        if (BubbleLayer.options.enableAjax) {
                            BubbleLayer.handleLayer(url);
                        } else {
                            window.location = url;
                        }
                        return false;
                    }
                };

                $layerSlider.find('.price-range input.input-text').each(function() {
                    this.stopObserving('keyup');
                    jQuery(this).focus(function(){
                        jQuery(this).addClass('has-background');
                        jQuery(this).next('div').hide()
                    });
                    jQuery(this).focusout(function(){
                        if(jQuery(this).val() == '' && jQuery(this).hasClass('has-background')){
                            jQuery(this).removeClass('has-background');
                            jQuery(this).next('div').show()
                        }
                    });
                    jQuery(this).keyup(function(e) {
                        if (e.keyCode == Event.KEY_RETURN) {
                            onFilter();
                        }
                    });
                });

                $layerSlider.find('.filter-button').click(onFilter);
            });

        });
    </script>
    <script>
        document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
            // Utility: Simulate mouse events from touch events
            function simulateMouseEvent(event, simulatedType) {
                if (event.touches.length > 1) return;
                var touch = event.changedTouches[0];
                var simulatedEvent = new MouseEvent(simulatedType, {
                    bubbles: true,
                    cancelable: true,
                    view: window,
                    detail: 1,
                    screenX: touch.screenX,
                    screenY: touch.screenY,
                    clientX: touch.clientX,
                    clientY: touch.clientY,
                    button: 0
                });
                event.target.dispatchEvent(simulatedEvent);
            }

            // Update only the specified handle's value
            function updateSliderValue(layerSlider, handleType) {
                var sliderEl = layerSlider.querySelector('.price-slider');
                if (!sliderEl) return;
                var track = sliderEl.querySelector('.bg');
                var sliderWidth = track ? track.clientWidth : sliderEl.clientWidth;

                var priceMinInput = layerSlider.querySelector('.price-min');
                var priceMaxInput = layerSlider.querySelector('.price-max');
                if (!priceMinInput || !priceMaxInput) return;
                var sliderMinPrice = parseFloat(priceMinInput.value);
                var sliderMaxPrice = parseFloat(priceMaxInput.value);

                if (handleType === 'min') {
                    var minHandle = sliderEl.querySelector('.handle.min');
                    if (!minHandle) return;
                    var minLeft = parseFloat(window.getComputedStyle(minHandle).left) || 0;
                    var currentMinPrice = sliderMinPrice + (sliderMaxPrice - sliderMinPrice) * (minLeft / sliderWidth);
                    var priceValueMin = layerSlider.querySelector('.price-value-min');
                    var sliderControlMin = layerSlider.querySelector('.slider-control.price-min-current');
                    if (priceValueMin) { priceValueMin.value = Math.round(currentMinPrice); }
                    if (sliderControlMin) { sliderControlMin.value = Math.round(currentMinPrice); }
                } else if (handleType === 'max') {
                    var maxHandle = sliderEl.querySelector('.handle.max');
                    if (!maxHandle) return;
                    // Instead of only using left, use the right edge of the handle.
                    var maxLeft = parseFloat(window.getComputedStyle(maxHandle).left);
                    var handleWidth = maxHandle.offsetWidth;
                    var effectiveMaxLeft = maxLeft + handleWidth;
                    // Calculate ratio based on effective right edge
                    var ratio = effectiveMaxLeft / sliderWidth;
                    var currentMaxPrice = sliderMinPrice + (sliderMaxPrice - sliderMinPrice) * ratio;
                    // If the handle's effective right edge is nearly at the track's end, force full maximum.
                    if (ratio > 0.98) {
                        currentMaxPrice = sliderMaxPrice;
                    }
                    var priceValueMax = layerSlider.querySelector('.price-value-max');
                    var sliderControlMax = layerSlider.querySelector('.slider-control.price-max-current');
                    if (priceValueMax) { priceValueMax.value = Math.round(currentMaxPrice); }
                    if (sliderControlMax) { sliderControlMax.value = Math.round(currentMaxPrice); }
                }
            }

            function enableTouchForHandle(handle) {
                if (!handle) return;
                handle.addEventListener("touchstart", function (e) {
                    simulateMouseEvent(e, "mousedown");
                }, { passive: false });
                handle.addEventListener("touchmove", function (e) {
                    simulateMouseEvent(e, "mousemove");
                    e.preventDefault(); // Prevent page scroll during slide
                }, { passive: false });
                handle.addEventListener("touchend", function (e) {
                    simulateMouseEvent(e, "mouseup");
                    // Identify the slider container
                    var layerSlider = handle.closest('.layer-slider.price_slider');
                    if (!layerSlider) return;
                    // Determine which handle was touched based on its CSS class
                    if (handle.classList.contains("min")) {
                        updateSliderValue(layerSlider, "min");
                    } else if (handle.classList.contains("max")) {
                        updateSliderValue(layerSlider, "max");
                    }
                    var filterButton = layerSlider.querySelector('.filter-button');
                    if (filterButton) {
                        filterButton.click();
                    }
                }, { passive: false });
            }

            // Apply touch support to all slider handles
            const handles = document.querySelectorAll(".price-slider .handle");
            handles.forEach(enableTouchForHandle);
        });
    </script>
                        </div>
                                                </div>
                    </div>
                                        <div class="filter-box-wrapper">
            <button type="button" class="close-responsive-filters button custom_width filters-vertical close" title="Închide">Închide</button>
            <button type="button" class="button custom_width filters-vertical apply" title="Adaugă">Adaugă</button>
            <button type="button" class="button custom_width filters-vertical clear" title="Sterge">Sterge</button>
            </div>
        </div>
        </div>

<div id="bubble-layer-overlay" style="display:none;">

<script type="text/javascript">
//<![CDATA[
var BubbleLayer = new BubbleLayer({
    enableAjax: false,
    enableAutoScroll: true,
    enableAjaxToolbar: false,
    currentUrl: jQuery('<div>').html('https://www.ozone.ro/theme-pok-mon-pokemon/?categorie=gaming').text() /* HTML decode */,
    priceFormat: {"pattern":"%s\u00a0<span class=\"currency\">Lei<\/span>","precision":2,"requiredPrecision":0,"decimalSymbol":",","groupSymbol":".","groupLength":3,"integerRequired":1},
    onUpdateComplete: function() {
        $$('.block-layered-nav dt').invoke('observe', 'click', function () {
            BubbleLayer.handlePriceSliders();
        });

        BubbleLayer.adaptHeight('.bubble-layer-top .block-content');
        BubbleLayer.adaptHeight('.category-products .product-info');

        if (typeof BubbleAjaxCart != 'undefined' && BubbleAjaxCart) {
            BubbleAjaxCart.init();
        }
    }
});
// Adapt filter height
BubbleLayer.adaptHeight('.bubble-layer-top .block-content');
//]]>
let paramString = '';
let closeVFiltersSel = jQuery('.filters-vertical.close');
let applyVFiltersSel = jQuery('.filters-vertical.apply');
let clearVFiltersSel = jQuery('.filters-vertical.clear');

function prepareVerticalParams() {
    let filters = {};

    jQuery('.sidebar ul.sub-options li.active .checkbox-filter').each(function() {
        const key = jQuery(this).data('filter-key');
        if (!(key in filters)) {
            filters[key] = [];
        }

        filters[key].push(jQuery(this).data('filter-value'));
    });

    let params = [];
    for (const [key, values] of Object.entries(filters)) {
        params.push(`${key}=${values.join(',')}`);
    }

    // Price Slider
    let priceSliderSel = '.sidebar .layer-slider';
    let priceMin = jQuery(`${priceSliderSel} .price-min`).val();
    let priceMax = jQuery(`${priceSliderSel} .price-max`).val();
    let priceCMin = jQuery(`${priceSliderSel} .price-min-current`).val();
    let priceCMax = jQuery(`${priceSliderSel} .price-max-current`).val();

    if ((priceMin !== priceCMin && priceCMin !== '') || (priceMax !== priceCMax && priceCMax !== '')) {
        let requestVar = jQuery(`${priceSliderSel} .request-var`).val();
        let val1 = '';
        let val2 = '';
        if (priceMin !== priceCMin) {
            val1 = priceCMin;
        }
        if (priceMax !== priceCMax) {
            val2 = priceCMax;
        }

        params.push(`${requestVar}=${val1}-${val2}`);
    }

    paramString = params.join('&');
}

function transformFilters() {
    closeVFiltersSel.show();


    // jQuery('.sidebar .checkbox-filter').each(function() {
    //     if (jQuery(this).prop('checked')) {
    //         clearVFiltersSel.show();
    //         return false;
    //     }
    // });
    // jQuery('.sidebar .layer-slider').each(function() {
    //     if (jQuery(this).find('.price-min').val() != jQuery(this).find('.price-min-current').val()) {
    //         clearVFiltersSel.show();
    //         return false;
    //     }
    //     if (jQuery(this).find('.price-max').val() != jQuery(this).find('.price-max-current').val()) {
    //         clearVFiltersSel.show();
    //         return false;
    //     }
    // });

    jQuery('.sidebar .layer-slider .is_static').val('1');
    // jQuery('.sidebar .layer-slider .price-slider-inputs').hide();
    // jQuery('.sidebar .layer-slider .filter-button').hide();
    BubbleLayer.handlePriceSliders();

    let filterSpanSelector = jQuery('.sidebar ul.sub-options li span');
    filterSpanSelector.each(function() {
        jQuery(this).removeAttr('onclick');
    });

    filterSpanSelector.click(function() {
        applyVFiltersSel.show();
        jQuery(this).parents('li').toggleClass('active');
        prepareVerticalParams();
    });



    jQuery(`.input-text.left`).on('input', function (){
        jQuery(`.sidebar .layer-slider .price-min-current`).val(jQuery(this).val());
        applyVFiltersSel.show();
        prepareVerticalParams();
    })

    jQuery(`.input-text.right`).on('input', function (){
        jQuery(`.sidebar .layer-slider .price-max-current`).val(jQuery(this).val());
        applyVFiltersSel.show();
        prepareVerticalParams();
    })

    jQuery('.sidebar .layer-slider .price-range .price').on('DOMSubtreeModified', function() {
        applyVFiltersSel.show();
        prepareVerticalParams();
    })

    applyVFiltersSel.click(function(e) {
        e.preventDefault();
        if (paramString !== '') {
            window.location = `${window.location.pathname}?${paramString}`
        } else {
            window.location = window.location.pathname
        }
    })

    clearVFiltersSel.click(function(e) {
        e.preventDefault();
        window.location = window.location.pathname
    });
}

if (jQuery(window).width() <= 767) {
    console.log('Transforming Mobile Filters...');
    transformFilters();

    jQuery('.number-selected-filters').hide()
    jQuery('.drop-down.multiselect a.open-item').addClass('mobile-open')
    jQuery('.drop-down.multiselect a.open-item.mobile-open').next('.filter-mobile-wrapper').hide()
    jQuery('.drop-down.multiselect.price a.open-item.mobile-open').next('.filter-mobile-wrapper').show() // always open price box
    jQuery('.drop-down.multiselect.price .mobile-arrow-icon').hide()

    jQuery('.drop-down a.open-item.mobile-open').on('click', function (){
        if (jQuery(this).parent('.drop-down.multiselect.price').length) { // Not open price slider
            return
        }
        jQuery(this).next('.filter-mobile-wrapper').toggle('slow')
        jQuery(this).next('.filter-mobile-wrapper').toggleClass('selectedFilter')
        jQuery(this).prev().prev('.mobile-arrow-icon').toggleClass("down");
    })

    jQuery('.sidebar .multiselect .checkbox-filter').change(function(){
        var fillterKey = jQuery(this).data('filter-key')

        if (jQuery(`.sidebar .multiselect [data-filter-key~="${fillterKey}"]:checked`).length !== 0) {
            jQuery(this).parent().closest('.multiselect').find('.number-selected-filters').text(`${jQuery(`.sidebar .multiselect [data-filter-key~="${fillterKey}"]:checked`).length}`).show()
        } else {
            jQuery(this).parent().closest('.multiselect').find('.number-selected-filters').text(``).hide()
        }
    });

    jQuery('.sidebar .multiselect .checkbox-filter').each(function (){
        var fillterKey = jQuery(this).data('filter-key')

        if (jQuery(`.sidebar .multiselect [data-filter-key~="${fillterKey}"]:checked`).length !== 0) {
            jQuery(this).parent().closest('.multiselect').find('.number-selected-filters').text(`${jQuery(`.sidebar .multiselect [data-filter-key~="${fillterKey}"]:checked`).length}`).show()
        } else {
            jQuery(this).parent().closest('.multiselect').find('.number-selected-filters').text(``).hide()
        }
    })

    jQuery('.remove-all-filters').on('click', function (e) {
        // jQuery(this).attr('href', '');
        e.preventDefault();

        // Unselect checkboxes
        jQuery('.sidebar .multiselect .checkbox-filter').each(function (){
            var fillterKey = jQuery(this).data('filter-key')

            if (jQuery(`.sidebar .multiselect [data-filter-key~="${fillterKey}"]:checked`).length !== 0) {
                jQuery(this).parent().removeClass('active')
                jQuery(this).prop('checked', false);
                jQuery(this).parent().closest('.multiselect').find('.number-selected-filters').text(``).hide()
            }
        })
        // END Unselect checkboxes

        // Reset price slider
        jQuery(`.sidebar .layer-slider .price-min-current`).val('');
        jQuery(`.sidebar .layer-slider .price-max-current`).val('');

        jQuery(`.sidebar .layer-slider .price-value-min`).val(jQuery(`.sidebar .layer-slider .price-min`).val());
        jQuery(`.sidebar .layer-slider .price-value-max`).val(jQuery(`.sidebar .layer-slider .price-max`).val());
        jQuery(`.sidebar .layer-slider .price-input-wrapper div.left`).val(jQuery(`.sidebar .layer-slider .price-min`).val());
        jQuery(`.sidebar .layer-slider .price-input-wrapper div.right`).val(jQuery(`.sidebar .layer-slider .price-max`).val());

        jQuery(`.price-slider`).replaceWith( `
        <div class="price-slider">
            <div class="bg"></div>
            <div class="handle min"></div>
            <div class="span"></div>
            <div class="handle max"></div>
        </div>
        ` );

        BubbleLayer.handlePriceSliders();
        BubbleLayer.handlePriceSlider();
        // END Reset price slider

        closeVFiltersSel.hide();

        applyVFiltersSel.show();
        prepareVerticalParams();

    })


    jQuery(`.state-filter a.filter`).on('click', function (e) {
        jQuery(this).attr('href', '');
        e.preventDefault();
        var fillterID = jQuery(this).data('filter-id')
        var fillterKey = jQuery(this).data('filter-key')
        var priceSlider = jQuery(this).hasClass('price')


        jQuery(`.sidebar .multiselect [data-filter-value~="${fillterID}"]`).parent().removeClass('active')
        jQuery(`.sidebar .multiselect [data-filter-value~="${fillterID}"]`).click()

        if ( jQuery(this).parent()[0].children.length > 2 ) {
            jQuery(this).remove()
        } else {
            jQuery(this).parent()[0].children[0].remove()
            jQuery(this).remove()
        }

        if (priceSlider) {
            // Reset price slider
            jQuery(`.sidebar .layer-slider .price-min-current`).val('');
            jQuery(`.sidebar .layer-slider .price-max-current`).val('');

            jQuery(`.sidebar .layer-slider .price-value-min`).val(jQuery(`.sidebar .layer-slider .price-min`).val());
            jQuery(`.sidebar .layer-slider .price-value-max`).val(jQuery(`.sidebar .layer-slider .price-max`).val());
            jQuery(`.sidebar .layer-slider .price-input-wrapper div.left`).val(jQuery(`.sidebar .layer-slider .price-min`).val());
            jQuery(`.sidebar .layer-slider .price-input-wrapper div.right`).val(jQuery(`.sidebar .layer-slider .price-max`).val());

            jQuery(`.price-slider`).replaceWith( `
                <div class="price-slider">
                    <div class="bg"></div>
                    <div class="handle min"></div>
                    <div class="span"></div>
                    <div class="handle max"></div>
                </div>
            `);

            BubbleLayer.handlePriceSliders();
            BubbleLayer.handlePriceSlider();
            // END Reset price slider
        }


        applyVFiltersSel.show();
        prepareVerticalParams();

    })


} else {
    jQuery( document ).ready(function() {
        jQuery(".clever-link-filter").click(function () {
            window.open(jQuery(this).data("link"), "_self");
            return false;
        });
    });
}


</script>

<div id="stenik-ajaxaddtocart-result" style="display: none"></div>
<div id="stenik-ajaxaddtocart-overlay" style="display: none"></div>

<script>
    (function($) {

        var procesingOnclickAddToCart = false;

        function addToCart(productId, quantity) {

			try {
				if(window.location.href.indexOf('onestepcheckout') > 0){
					return true;
				}
			} catch (e) {}

            var data = {};
            data.product = productId;
            data.qty = quantity;
            if (typeof data.form_key === 'undefined') {
                data.form_key = null            }

            if (data.form_key === null) {
                data.form_key = "4rZLDloPQPIBTsmE"            }

            if ($('#cookie_form_key').val() != '') {
                data.form_key = $('#cookie_form_key').val();
            }
            ajaxProcess(data, true)
        }

        function ajaxProcess(data, fromAddToCart, $element) {
            if (!procesingOnclickAddToCart) {
                jQuery.ajax({
                    url: "https:\/\/www.ozone.ro\/stenik_ajaxaddtocart\/index\/add\/",
                    method: 'post',
                    dataType: 'json',
                    timeout: 13000, // Set the timeout to 13 seconds
                    data: data,
                    beforeSend: function() {
                        procesingOnclickAddToCart = true;

                        if (data.cpid) { // animation work for conf product
                            data.product = data.cpid
                        }

                        // Product page button
                        $(`a.add-to-cart.product_cart_${data.product} svg`).hide()
                        $(`a.add-to-cart.product_cart_${data.product}`).css('font-size', '0').append(`<span class="add-to-cart-loader-btn product_cart_${data.product}"></span>`);
                        // Listing widgets with icon
                        $(`span.add-to-cart.product_cart_${data.product} svg`).hide();
                        $(`span.add-to-cart.product_cart_${data.product}`).append(`<span class="add-to-cart-loader product_cart_${data.product}"></span>`)
                        // Listing list view
                        $(`.list-mode span.add-to-cart.product_cart_list_${data.product} svg`).hide();
                        $(`.list-mode span.add-to-cart.product_cart_list_${data.product}`).css('font-size', '0').css('min-width', '150px').append(`<span class="add-to-cart-loader-btn product_cart_${data.product}"></span>`);
                        // Search page listing
                        $(`.isp_add_to_cart_btn[data-productid="${data.product}"]`).hide().parent('form').append(`<span class="add-to-cart-loader product_cart_${data.product}" style="right: 12px;"></span>`)
                        // Wishlist and shared wishlist
                        var move_to_cart_product_height = $(`.move-to-cart-product`)[0];
                        if (move_to_cart_product_height) {
                            move_to_cart_product_height = `style="height:${$(`.move-to-cart-product`)[0].clientHeight}px;"`
                        } else {
                            move_to_cart_product_height = '';
                        }
                        $(`#item_${data.product}_wish`).parent('.whish-product').append(`<div class="loader_wish_wrapper product_cart_${data.product}" ${move_to_cart_product_height}><span class="add-to-cart-loader-btn product_cart_${data.product}"></span></div>`);
                        $(`#item_${data.product}_wish`).hide()
                        // Product page sticky bar
                        $(`.fixed-addto-cart-bar.sticky_${data.product} .right-addtocart-bar a.add-to-cart`).css('font-size', '0').append(`<span class="add-to-cart-loader-btn product_cart_${data.product}"></span>`);
                    },
                }).done(function(response) {
                    procesingOnclickAddToCart = false;

					if (response.redirect) {
                        window.location.href = response.redirect;
                        return false;
                    }

                    // Product page button
                    $(`a.add-to-cart.product_cart_${data.product} svg`).show()
                    $(`a.add-to-cart.product_cart_${data.product}`).css('font-size', '15px')
                    $(`span.add-to-cart-loader-btn.product_cart_${data.product}`).remove()
                    // Listing widgets with icon
                    $(`span.add-to-cart.product_cart_${data.product} svg`).show();
                    $(`span.add-to-cart-loader.product_cart_${data.product}`).remove()
                    // Listing list view
                    $(`.list-mode span.add-to-cart.product_cart_list_${data.product} svg`).show();
                    $(`.list-mode span.add-to-cart.product_cart_list_${data.product}`).css('font-size', '12px').css('min-width', '50px')
                    // Search page listing
                    $(`.isp_add_to_cart_btn[data-productid="${data.product}"]`).show();
                    // Wishlist and shared wishlist
                    $(`#item_${data.product}_wish`).show()
                    $(`.loader_wish_wrapper.product_cart_${data.product}`).remove()
                    // Product page sticky bar
                    $(`.fixed-addto-cart-bar.sticky_${data.product} .right-addtocart-bar a.add-to-cart`).css('font-size', 'unset')

                    if ((typeof response.update !== 'undefined') && response.update) {
                        for (var i = 0; i < response.update.length; i++) {
                            $(response.update[i].selector).replaceWith(response.update[i].html);
                        }
                    }

					if(response.script){
						eval(response.script);
					}

                    if ((typeof response.html !== 'undefined') && response.html) {
                        // hideOverlay = false;
                        var $resultWrapper = $('#stenik-ajaxaddtocart-result');
                        $resultWrapper.html(response.html);
                        $resultWrapper.find('.closeAddToCartResult').click(function() {
                            $resultWrapper.hide();
                            $('#stenik-ajaxaddtocart-overlay').hide();
                            // $('body').removeClass('scroll-disabled');
                        });
                        // $(document).keyup(function(e) {
                        //      if (e.keyCode == 27) {
                        //         $resultWrapper.hide();
                        //         $('#stenik-ajaxaddtocart-overlay').hide();
                        //         $('body').removeClass('scroll-disabled');
                        //     }
                        // });

                        // $resultWrapper.show();
                        // $('body').addClass('scroll-disabled');

                        var main_href = $(`.product_cart_${data.product} .shopping-cart use`).attr("xlink:href");
                        if (response.success) {

                            let atcCandidates = $('.checkout-cart-index .ambanners .product-box .add-to-cart');
                            if ($element && atcCandidates.length > 0) {
                                atcCandidates.each(function() {
                                    if ($(this).attr('id') === $element.attr('id')) {
                                        setTimeout(function() {
                                            location.reload();
                                        }, 2100);
                                    }
                                });
                            }

                            if ($('body').hasClass('checkout-cart-index') && fromAddToCart) {
                                setTimeout(function() {
                                    window.location.reload();
                                }, 2100);
                            }

                            if (main_href !== undefined) {
                                $(`.product_cart_${data.product} .shopping-cart use`).attr("xlink:href", main_href.substring(0, main_href.indexOf('#')) + "#shopping-cart-full")
                            }

                            $(`#item_${data.product}_wish`).val('Adăugat')
                            setTimeout(function() {
                                $(`#item_${data.product}_wish`).val('Cumpără')
                            }, 300);

                            if ($('body').hasClass('instantsearchplus-result-index')) {
                                $(`.isp_add_to_cart_btn[data-productid="${data.product}"]`).addClass('full')
                            }


                            iziToast.success({
                                timeout: 4000,
                                position: 'topRight',
                                message: response.message
                            });

                            if (typeof ttq !== 'undefined' && typeof response.product !== 'undefined') {
                                ttq.track('AddToCartOzoneBg', {
                                        value: response.product.price,
                                        currency: 'EUR',
                                        content_type: 'product',
                                        content_name: response.product.name,
                                        content_id: response.product.sku
                                    }
                                );
                            }
                        } else {
                            if (response.error) {
                                $(`.product_cart_${data.product} .shopping-cart use`).addClass('shake');
                                setTimeout(function() {
                                    $(`.product_cart_${data.product} .shopping-cart use`).removeClass('shake');
                                }, 300);

                                $(`#item_${data.product}_wish`).addClass('shake');
                                setTimeout(function() {
                                    $(`#item_${data.product}_wish`).removeClass('shake');
                                }, 300);

                                if ($('body').hasClass('instantsearchplus-result-index')) {
                                    $(`.isp_add_to_cart_btn[data-productid="${data.product}"]`).addClass('shake')
                                    setTimeout(function() {
                                        $(`.isp_add_to_cart_btn[data-productid="${data.product}"]`).removeClass('shake');
                                    }, 300);
                                }

                                iziToast.error({
                                    timeout: 4000,
                                    position: 'topRight',
                                    message: response.message
                                });
                            } else {
                                if ($(response.html).find(".warning-message")) {
                                    $(`.product_cart_${data.product} .shopping-cart use`).addClass('shake');
                                    setTimeout(function() {
                                        $(`.product_cart_${data.product} .shopping-cart use`).removeClass('shake');
                                    }, 300);

                                    if ($('body').hasClass('instantsearchplus-result-index')) {
                                        $(`.isp_add_to_cart_btn[data-productid="${data.product}"]`).addClass('shake')
                                        setTimeout(function() {
                                            $(`.isp_add_to_cart_btn[data-productid="${data.product}"]`).removeClass('shake');
                                        }, 300);
                                    }

                                    if ($(response.html).find(".warning-message").hasClass('link_to_ebook')) {
                                        var link_to_ebook = '<a href="/e-book/order/list/" style="font-weight: bold; text-decoration: underline;"> Виж</a> я в твоята е-библиотека.'
                                        iziToast.warning({
                                            timeout: 4000,
                                            position: 'topRight',
                                            message: $(response.html).find(".warning-message")[0].innerText + link_to_ebook
                                        });
                                    } else {
                                        iziToast.warning({
                                            timeout: 4000,
                                            position: 'topRight',
                                            message: $(response.html).find(".warning-message")[0].innerText
                                        });
                                    }

                                    // iziToast.warning({timeout: 4000, position:'topRight', message: $(response.html).find(".warning-message")[0].innerText});
                                }
                            }
                        }

                    }
                }).fail(function() {
                    //alert(//);
                    procesingOnclickAddToCart = false;
                    // Product page button
                    $(`a.add-to-cart.product_cart_${data.product} svg`).show()
                    $(`a.add-to-cart.product_cart_${data.product}`).css('font-size', 'unset')
                    $(`span.add-to-cart-loader-btn.product_cart_${data.product}`).remove()
                    // Listing widgets with icon
                    $(`span.add-to-cart.product_cart_${data.product} svg`).show();
                    $(`span.add-to-cart-loader.product_cart_${data.product}`).remove()
                    // Listing list view
                    $(`.list-mode span.add-to-cart.product_cart_list_${data.product} svg`).show();
                    $(`.list-mode span.add-to-cart.product_cart_list_${data.product}`).css('font-size', '12px').css('min-width', '50px')
                    // Search page listing
                    $(`.isp_add_to_cart_btn[data-productid="${data.product}"]`).show();
                    // Wishlist and shared wishlist
                    $(`#item_${data.product}_wish`).show()
                    $(`.loader_wish_wrapper.product_cart_${data.product}`).remove()
                    // Product page sticky bar
                    $(`.fixed-addto-cart-bar.sticky_${data.product} .right-addtocart-bar a.add-to-cart`).css('font-size', 'unset')
                }).always(function() {
                    // if (hideOverlay) {
                    //     $('#stenik-ajaxaddtocart-overlay').hide();
                    // }
                });
            }

        }

        var areFieldsValid = function($fields) {
            var $fields = $($fields);

            var areAllFieldsValid = true;

            $fields.each(function() {
                var fieldClasses = this.className.split(' ');
                for (var i = 0; i < fieldClasses.length; i++) {
                    try {
                        var validator = Validation.get(fieldClasses[i]);

                        if (Validation.isVisible(this) && !validator.test($F(this), this)) {
                            areAllFieldsValid = false;
                            return false;
                        }
                    } catch (e) {
                        areAllFieldsValid = false;
                        return false;
                    }
                }
            });

            return areAllFieldsValid;
        };

        var addToCartTrigger = function(e) {
            var $element = $(this);
            var $form = $element.closest('form');

            var data = {};
            if ($form.length) {
                if (!areFieldsValid($form.find('input,select,textarea'))) {
                    return true;
                }

                var dataArray = $form.serializeArray();

                for (var i = 0; i < dataArray.length; i++) {
                    if (typeof dataArray[i].name === 'undefined') {
                        continue;
                    }

                    if (typeof dataArray[i].value === 'undefined') {
                        dataArray[i].value = '';
                    }

                    if (dataArray[i].name.match(/\[\]$/)) {
                        // Array name

                        if (typeof data[dataArray[i].name] == 'undefined') {
                            data[dataArray[i].name] = [];
                        }

                        data[dataArray[i].name].push(dataArray[i].value);
                    } else {
                        data[dataArray[i].name] = dataArray[i].value;
                    }
                }
            }

            if (typeof data.product === 'undefined') {
                data.product = false;

                var destination = $element.data('origOnclickAttr');
                if (!destination) {
                    destination = $element.attr('href');
                }

                if (destination) {
                    var matches;
                    if (matches = destination.match(/product\/(\d+)/)) {
                        data.product = matches[1];
                    }

                    if (matches = destination.match(/form_key\/([^\/]+)/)) {
                        data.form_key = matches[1];
                    }
                }

                if (!data.product && $element.data('productid')) {
                    data.product = $element.data('productid');
                }

                if ($element.data('wishlistitemid')) {
                    data.wishlistItemId = $element.data('wishlistitemid');
                }

                if (!data.product && $element.attr('conf-url')) {
                    location.href = $element.attr('conf-url');
                    return false;
                }
            }

            if ($element.data('cpid')) {
                data.cpid = $element.data('cpid');
            }

            if (!data.product) {
                return true;
            }

            if (typeof data.form_key === 'undefined') {
                data.form_key = null            }

            if (data.form_key === null) {
                data.form_key = "4rZLDloPQPIBTsmE"            }

            if ($('#cookie_form_key').val() != '') {
                data.form_key = $('#cookie_form_key').val();
            }


            // $('#stenik-ajaxaddtocart-overlay').show();

            // var hideOverlay = true;

            ajaxProcess(data, false, $element);


            Event.stop(e);
            e.preventDefault();
            e.stopPropagation();
            e.stopImmediatePropagation();
            return false;
        };

        $("#product_addtocart_form .button.add-to-cart,.product-box .add-to-cart,#wishlist-view-form .whish-product .move-to-cart-product,.isp_add_to_cart_btn").each(function() {
            var $element = $(this);
            $element.click(addToCartTrigger.bind(this));

            var onclickAttrFunc = $element.prop('onclick');
            if (onclickAttrFunc) {
                $element.data('origOnclickAttr', $element.attr('onclick'));
                $element.removeProp('onclick');
                $element.removeAttr('onclick');
                $element.click(onclickAttrFunc);
            }
        });

        $('body').on('click', "#product_addtocart_form .button.add-to-cart,.product-box .add-to-cart,#wishlist-view-form .whish-product .move-to-cart-product,.isp_add_to_cart_btn", addToCartTrigger);
        window.addToCart = addToCart;
    })(jQuery);
</script>
<script>
    (function($) {
        var isWindowOnFocus = true;
        $(window).blur(function() {  isWindowOnFocus = false; });
        $(window).focus(function() { isWindowOnFocus = true; });

        var lastRefreshedTs = Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000);         var refreshTime     = 300; 
        setInterval(function() {
            if (!(document.hasFocus && document.hasFocus()) && !isWindowOnFocus) {
                return;
            }

            var now = Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000); 
            if (now - lastRefreshedTs < refreshTime) {
                return;
            }

            lastRefreshedTs = now;

            $.get("https:\/\/www.ozone.ro\/stenik_extendsessionwithajax\/index\/index\/");
        }, 1000);
    })(jQuery);
</script>            <input type="hidden" name="cookie_form_key" id="cookie_form_key" value="">

checked=this.isChecked(),switcher=this.switcher,jack=this.jack;if(clicked&&checked)checked=false;else if(clicked&&!checked)checked=true;if(checked===true){this.element.checked=true;if(window.getComputedStyle)jack.style.left=parseInt(window.getComputedStyle(switcher).width)-parseInt(window.getComputedStyle(jack).width)+"px";else jack.style.left=parseInt(switcher.currentStyle["width"])-parseInt(jack.currentStyle["width"])+"px";if(this.options.color)this.colorize();this.setSpeed()}else{jack.style.left=0;this.element.checked=false;this.switcher.style.boxShadow="inset 0 0 0 0 "+this.options.secondaryColor;this.switcher.style.borderColor=this.options.secondaryColor;this.switcher.style.backgroundColor=this.options.secondaryColor!==defaults.secondaryColor?this.options.secondaryColor:"#fff";this.jack.style.backgroundColor=this.options.jackSecondaryColor!==this.options.jackColor?this.options.jackSecondaryColor:this.options.jackColor;this.setSpeed()}};Switchery.prototype.setSpeed=function(){var switcherProp={},jackProp={"background-color":this.options.speed,left:this.options.speed.replace(/[a-z]/,"")/2+"s"};if(this.isChecked()){switcherProp={border:this.options.speed,"box-shadow":this.options.speed,"background-color":this.options.speed.replace(/[a-z]/,"")*3+"s"}}else{switcherProp={border:this.options.speed,"box-shadow":this.options.speed}}transitionize(this.switcher,switcherProp);transitionize(this.jack,jackProp)};Switchery.prototype.setSize=function(){var small="switchery-small",normal="switchery-default",large="switchery-large";switch(this.options.size){case"small":classes(this.switcher).add(small);break;case"large":classes(this.switcher).add(large);break;default:classes(this.switcher).add(normal);break}};Switchery.prototype.colorize=function(){var switcherHeight=this.switcher.offsetHeight/2;this.switcher.style.backgroundColor=this.options.color;this.switcher.style.borderColor=this.options.color;this.switcher.style.boxShadow="inset 0 0 0 "+switcherHeight+"px "+this.options.color;this.jack.style.backgroundColor=this.options.jackColor};Switchery.prototype.handleOnchange=function(state){if(document.dispatchEvent){var event=document.createEvent("HTMLEvents");event.initEvent("change",true,true);this.element.dispatchEvent(event)}else{this.element.fireEvent("onchange")}};Switchery.prototype.handleChange=function(){var self=this,el=this.element;if(el.addEventListener){el.addEventListener("change",function(){self.setPosition()})}else{el.attachEvent("onchange",function(){self.setPosition()})}};Switchery.prototype.handleClick=function(){var switcher=this.switcher;fastclick(switcher);this.events.bind("click","bindClick")};Switchery.prototype.bindClick=function(){var parent=this.element.parentNode.tagName.toLowerCase(),labelParent=parent==="label"?false:true;this.setPosition(labelParent);this.handleOnchange(this.element.checked)};Switchery.prototype.markAsSwitched=function(){this.element.setAttribute("data-switchery",true)};Switchery.prototype.markedAsSwitched=function(){return this.element.getAttribute("data-switchery")};Switchery.prototype.init=function(){this.hide();this.show();this.setSize();this.setPosition();this.markAsSwitched();this.handleChange();this.handleClick()};Switchery.prototype.isChecked=function(){return this.element.checked};Switchery.prototype.isDisabled=function(){return this.options.disabled||this.element.disabled||this.element.readOnly};Switchery.prototype.destroy=function(){this.events.unbind()};Switchery.prototype.enable=function(){if(!this.options.disabled)return;if(this.options.disabled)this.options.disabled=false;if(this.element.disabled)this.element.disabled=false;if(this.element.readOnly)this.element.readOnly=false;this.switcher.style.opacity=1;this.events.bind("click","bindClick")};Switchery.prototype.disable=function(){if(this.options.disabled)return;if(!this.options.disabled)this.options.disabled=true;if(!this.element.disabled)this.element.disabled=true;if(!this.element.readOnly)this.element.readOnly=true;this.switcher.style.opacity=this.options.disabledOpacity;this.destroy()}});if(typeof exports=="object"){module.exports=require("switchery")}else if(typeof define=="function"&&define.amd){define("Switchery",[],function(){return require("switchery")})}else{(this||window)["Switchery"]=require("switchery")}})();
</script>

    <div class="modalContentCookie">

            <p>Când vizitați un site web, acesta stochează sau accesează informații din browser-ul dvs. prin cookie-uri. Aceste informații sunt de obicei legate de preferințele dumneavoastră sau de dispozitivul dumneavoastră și sunt folosite pentru a îmbunătăți utilizarea site-ului. Puteți opri anumite tipuri de cookie-uri, dar blocarea acestora poate împiedica funcționarea corectă a site-ului.</p>

            <div class="cookieSettingsHeader">

Daca blocati aceste cookie-uri este posibil ca unele functii sau chiar toate aceste functii sa nu functioneze corect.                    </p>
                    <div class="cookie_h1_1">Cookie-uri utilizate</div>

            <button class="accordion">Pentru eficienta<div class="cookie_h2"><input id="is_productive" type="checkbox" checked> <span id="label_is_productive"></span></div></button>
            <div class="panel">

                    <p>

Datorita lor urmarim vizitele si sursele de trafic, urmarim care sunt paginile cele mai populare, care sunt mai putin populare si modul in care vizitatorii navigheaza pe site. Informatiile colectate sunt anonime. Daca blocati aceste cookie-uri, nu vom sti cand ati vizitat site-ul nostru.                    </p>
                    <!-- <div class="cookie_h1_1">Cookie-uri utilizate</div> -->
                    <a class="cookie_a" href="https://www.google.com/analytics/" target="_blank">Google Analytics</a>
                    <a class="cookie_a" href="https://clarity.microsoft.com/" target="_blank">Microsoft Clarity</a>
                    <a class="cookie_a" href="https://useinsider.com/" target="_blank">Insider</a>
                </div>
            </div>

            <button class="accordion">Marketing<div class="cookie_h2"><input id="is_marketing" type="checkbox" checked> <span id="label_is_marketing"></span></div></button>
            <div class="panel">
                <div id="cookie_content5">
                    <!-- <div class="cookie_h1">Cookie-uri de marketing</div> -->

                    <div style="clear:both"></div>
                    <p>
                        Aceste cookie-uri sunt create pe site-ul nostru de catre partenerii nostrii de publicitate. Ele pot fi utilizate de aceste companii pentru a crea un cont al intereselor dvs. si pentru a permite afisarea anunturilor si mesajelor de pe alte site-uri. Functioneaza prin identificarea unica a browserului si dispozitivului dvs. Daca le blocati, nu veti primi reclama noastra orientata.                    </p>
                    <!-- <div class="cookie_h1_1">Cookie-uri utilizate</div> -->
                    <a class="cookie_a" href="https://www.google.com/analytics/tag-manager/" target="_blank">Google Tag Manager</a>
                    <a class="cookie_a" href="https://www.facebook.com/" target="_blank">Facebook tracker</a>
					<a class="cookie_a" href="https://www.tiktok.com/" target="_blank">TikTok tracker</a>
                </div>
            </div>

            <button class="accordion">Mai multa informatie</button>
            <div class="panel">
                <div id="cookie_content6">
                    <!-- <div class="cookie_h1">Politica de utilizare a cookie-urilor</div> -->

                    <div style="clear:both"></div>
                    <p>
                        <b>Ce reprezinta cookie-urile</b>
                    </p>
                    <p>
                        •	Cookie-urile sunt fisiere cu informatii stocate pe hard disck-ul computerului dvs. Care inregistreaza modul in care navigati pe un site web, astfel incat atunci cand il vizitati din nou va prezinta cateva optiuni bazate pe informatiile stocate de la vizita anterioara. Cookie-urile pot fi utilizate atat pentru analiza traficului, cat si pentru publicitate si marketing.                    </p>
                    <p>
                        •	Cookie-urile sunt utilizate de majoritatea  site-urilor web si nu dauneaza  sistemului de operare                        Daca doriti sa modificati sau sa verificati ce tip de cookie-uri acceptati, puteti face acest lucru in  setarile browserului utilizat de dvs. Puteti bloca in orice moment toate cookie-urile sau doar unele dintre ele, activand setarea browserului care permite aceasta activitate. Dar daca blocati toate cookie-urile (inclusiv cookie-urile de baza), nu veti avea acces la tot sau la o anumita parte a site-ului nostru.                    </p>
                    <br/>
                    <p>
                        <b>Cum utilizam cookie-urile?</b>
                    </p>
                    <p>
                        •	Cookie-urile ne ajuta sa intelegem cum utilizati site-ul nostru. Aceasta analiza ne ajuta sa dezvoltam sau sa imbunatatim site-ul, precum si produsele si /sau serviciile si sa putem sa va oferim ceea ce aveti nevoie.                    </p>
                    <p>
                        •	Cookie-urile sunt:
                    </p>
                    <p>
                        - Cookie-uri de sesiune: Acestea sunt stocate in computerul dvs doar in timpul sesiuni web si sunt sterse automat la inchiderea browserului - stocheaza un numar de identificare anonim al sesiei, care va permite sa navigati pe site fara sa fie nevoie sa va logati pe fiecare pagina si nu stocheaza nicio informatie personala de pe computerul dvs.                    </p>
                    <p>
                        - Cookie-uri persistente: Cookie-ul persistent este stocat ca si fisier in computer si ramane acolo cand inchideti browserul. Cookie-ul poate fi citit de site-ul care l-a creat atunci cand  vizitati site-ul din nou.                    </p>
                    <p>
                        •	Cookie-urile pot fi, de asemenea clasificate dupa cum urmeaza:
                    </p>
                    <p>
                        - Cookie-uri necesare: Aceste cookie-uri sunt esentiale pentru a putea utiliza site-ul in mod eficient, cum ar fi atunci cand achizitionati un produs si/sau serviciu si, prin urmare nu pot fi oprite. Fara aceste cookie-uri, serviciile disponibile pentru dvs. pe site-ul nostru nu pot fi furnizate. Aceste cookie-uri nu colecteaza informatii despre dvs. care sa fie folosite pentru marketing sau sa reaminteasca locul de acces la internet.                    </p>
                    <p>
                        - Cookie-uri functionale: Aceste cookie-uri ne permit sa monitorizam si sa imbunatatim performantele site-ului nostru. Acestea ne permit sa urmarim vizitele, sa identificam sursele de trafic si sa urmarim cele mai utilizate parti ale site-ului.                    </p>
                    <p>
                        - Cookie-uri de marketing: Aceste cookie-uri se creeaza pe site de catre partenerii nostrii de publicitate. Pot fi utilizate de aceste companii in scopul de a crea un profil al intereselor dvs. si permit afisarea reclamelor si mesajelor in afara platformei a altor site-uri. Functioneaza prin identificarea unica a browserului si dispozitivului dvs. Daca le blocati, nu veti primi reclama noastra orientata.                     </p>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

`;

    document.write(html_cookie);
</script>
